summary: Iteration 70 - Testing Registration, Role Selection, Admin Notifications Bank, and CSV Import. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend tests passed (100%). Verified: (1) PUT /api/auth/set-role accepts 'artist', 'producer', 'label' as valid roles, (2) POST /api/auth/register creates user with correct user_role field, (3) BOTH admin accounts receive new_signup notification after registration, (4) Admin Notification Bank page at /admin/notifications with search/filter/pagination, (5) Notification bell dropdown works with mark-as-read functionality, (6) CSV import creates stream_events correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/auth/set-role accepts 'artist' role
Backend: PUT /api/auth/set-role accepts 'producer' role
Backend: PUT /api/auth/set-role accepts 'label' role
Backend: PUT /api/auth/set-role returns 400 for invalid role
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user with user_role='artist'
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user with user_role='producer'
Backend: POST /api/auth/register creates user with user_role='label'
Backend: BOTH admins (admin@kalmori.com AND submitkalmori@gmail.com) receive new_signup notification
Backend: GET /api/admin/notifications-bank returns paginated results
Backend: GET /api/admin/notifications-bank?type=new_signup filters by type
Backend: GET /api/admin/notifications-bank?read=false filters unread only
Backend: GET /api/admin/notifications-bank?search=... searches by message
Backend: PUT /api/admin/notifications-bank/{id}/read marks notification as read
Backend: PUT /api/admin/notifications-bank/read-all marks all as read
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/notifications-bank/{id} deletes notification
Backend: POST /api/analytics/import creates stream_events
Backend: GET /api/analytics/overview returns aggregated data
Frontend: /select-role page shows 3 role options (Artist, Producer, Label)
Frontend: Role buttons have correct data-testid attributes (role-artist-btn, role-producer-btn, role-label-btn)
Frontend: /admin/notifications page loads with Notification Bank title
Frontend: Admin Notification Bank has search input (data-testid='notification-search')
Frontend: Admin Notification Bank has type filter (data-testid='notification-type-filter')
Frontend: Admin Notification Bank has read filter (data-testid='notification-read-filter')
Frontend: Admin Notification Bank has Mark All as Read button (data-testid='mark-all-read-bank')
Frontend: Notification bell dropdown opens with data-testid='notification-panel'
critical_code_review_comments: Registration endpoint correctly stores user_role field from request body
send_admin_signup_notification uses find() not find_one() to notify ALL admins
Admin Notification Bank endpoints properly filter by user_id=admin['id']
Frontend RoleSelectionPage.jsx has all 3 role buttons with correct data-testid attributes
Frontend AdminNotificationsPage.jsx has search, type filter, read filter, and mark-all-read functionality
DashboardLayout.jsx notification panel onClick is async with await before navigation
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin accounts and created test users via API
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 70 verified: (1) Role selection works for artist/producer/label via PUT /api/auth/set-role. (2) Registration stores user_role correctly. (3) BOTH admin accounts receive new_signup notifications (send_admin_signup_notification uses find() to get ALL admins). (4) Admin Notification Bank at /admin/notifications has full CRUD with search/filter/pagination. (5) Notification bell dropdown in DashboardLayout works with async onClick for mark-as-read. (6) CSV import via POST /api/analytics/import works for admin users.

admin_signup_notifications.behavior: BOTH admin accounts receive new_signup notification
admin_signup_notifications.implementation: send_admin_signup_notification uses find() to get ALL admins
